hooks.command: cd ~/pureMind && git add memory/ knowledge/ projects/ templates/ daily-logs/ .claude/skills/ .claude/hooks/ .claude/integrations/ .claude/settings.json tools/ tests/ migrations/ reviews/ CLAUDE.md README.md SECURITY.md requirements.txt .gitignore 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git commit -m "auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M) vault update"; fi
